title: pilosella officinarum
intro: Pilosella officinarum, also known as mouse-ear hawk's-beard, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pilosella officinarum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in digestion. Pilosella officinarum can be prepared as an herbal remedy through teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
